programs.title: Island Hunters
programs.sub_title: Catering to Tourists on Lake Nicaragua
programs.desc: After falling in love with the beauty of Lake Nicaragua almost a decade ago, UK native Gemma decided to start her own touring company in the region with her business partner Scott.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: From slow-smoked bison ribs in Colorado to chicken wings topped with cinnamon sugar and icing in Rhode Island, hunting down proteins that satisfy every carnivorous craving.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: From an Arizona joint's chicken fried steak smothered in gravy to sweet, fluffy doughnuts in Rhode Island, getting in line to find dishes that diners don't mind waiting hours to sink their teeth into.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: From Japanese-flavored breakfast egg skillets in Hawaii to an update on Eggs Benedict in New Orleans, the egg comes first as Food Paradise cracks open an array of egg-cellent creations.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: Cajun and Creole classics from hot jazz snacks and bayou-fresh catfish to the famous Sno-Blizz.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: A Route 66 road trip from Chicago to Southern California; authentic St. Louis barbecue ribs in Missouri; the iconic Oklahoma Onion Burger; custom-built milk shakes in Albuquerque, N.M.
